channel.title: Github Pages on Romulus Crisan
channel.description: Recent content in Github Pages on Romulus Crisan

item.title: Blog 2.0
item.author: cromica@gmail.com (Romulus Crisan)
item.description: It’s been awhile since I’ve written my last article and if you’ve been on my blog before you will probably notice that it has new look. I was absolutely fine with the previous design and I didn’t have any intention to change it but this came as a side effect of changing my blogging platform. If you followed my blog, you probably knew I was using Github Pages and that worked great for me until it didn’t. This article will talk more about why I moved from Github Pages but if you are still interested in my initial setup have a look here.
